name: Dentrix Dental Practice Management API
what_it_does: Dentrix REST API for dental practice management system (Henry Schein One). Enables AI agents to manage patient scheduling and appointment workflows, handle treatment planning and case presentation data, access dental billing and insurance claim management, retrieve clinical charting and periodontal data, manage dental imaging integration, handle patient communications and recall workflows, access production and collection analytics, retrieve hygiene and treatment tracking data, manage patient eligibility verification, and integrate dental practice data with imaging, analytics, and dental supply platforms.
use_cases: Managing patient scheduling and recall workflows from dental practice automation agents
Accessing treatment plan and case acceptance from dental productivity agents
Retrieving production and collection analytics from dental business intelligence agents
Integrating dental billing and insurance from accounts receivable agents
not_for: Non-dental healthcare without dental-specific charting and treatment planning
Oral surgery or specialty dental without general practice management focus
Dental supply without dental practice software integration needs
best_when: A dental practice or DSO (Dental Service Organization) using Dentrix wants AI agents to automate appointment scheduling, recall management, insurance verification, production analytics, and treatment plan follow-up.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Dental patient records including X-rays and clinical notes are PHI. Dental imaging data includes radiographs. Insurance claim automation must comply with ADA CDT codes and payer rules. Automated treatment plan presentation must have dentist oversight.

auth.notes: Dentrix uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Practice-level credentials with patient, scheduling, and clinical scopes. Developer portal via Henry Schein One. Dentrix G7 and Dentrix Enterprise have separate APIs. Integration with Dentrix imaging and analytics. Webhooks for scheduling events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — dental practice enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: American Fork, Utah. Part of Henry Schein One (Henry Schein/Veracross JV). Founded 1985. Market leader for US dental practice management. Used by 35,000+ dental practices. Henry Schein acquired Dentrix. Henry Schein One consolidates dental software brands. Dentrix Enterprise for DSOs. Competes with Eaglesoft and Curve Dental for dental PM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Dental patient PHI including X-rays and clinical charts — BAA required
Dentrix vs Dentrix Enterprise have different APIs — verify which is deployed (practice vs DSO)
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API via Henry Schein One developer portal
ADA CDT code compliance required for automated dental billing and insurance claims
Imaging integration (X-rays) uses separate imaging bridge — not directly in main API
Treatment plan automation must preserve dentist authority for diagnosis and treatment decisions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Dental patient PHI and clinical records. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Dental imaging sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Dental patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. X-ray and clinical data.
